creator: thindil@laeran.pl.eu.org
text:
Created attachment 240915
525.89.02 (added more missing Linux libraries)

The new version of patch. I think, I found all needed Linux libraries and their symlinks, but it still needs to be tested by someone. Also, as I wrote earlier, removed nvidia-glx-updater, it seems to be application-based file, not need for the driver.
